caption: A man with light-colored hair is seen in a small inset video window, positioned in the lower-left portion of a digital interface. He is wearing a black shirt and speaking. The surrounding screen displays a sports video game menu for a player named "CHIGOZIEM OKONKWO," identified as a "TE" with an overall rating of "89." The interface features a purple and black color scheme with various attribute bars and numbers, such as "6' 3"", "243", and ratings like "90", "71", and "81". A player card on the right shows a football player in a blue and white uniform. Text at the top includes "LVL 19" and various numerical values like "2,343,543". Across the frames, the layout of the menu remains static, while the man in the inset window changes his facial expressions and gestures as he talks.
